headline: Dear Super Micro Computer Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for May 26
summary: Super Micro is still posting explosive top‑line growth and big EPS gains, but the DOJ export‑scheme indictment, a lost Oracle order, and excess Nvidia GPU inventory for xAI have turned it from a pure AI winner into an overhang‑heavy story trading at a discount multiple.
